name: reviewer-team
description: Parallel expert reviewers: security, performance, a11y, types. Orchestrator merges findings.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews a diff for OWASP-class issues: XSS, injection, auth gaps, secret leakage.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging concrete security risks with file:line citations. Out of scope: style, performance, a11y.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews a diff for runtime/render-cost regressions: unstable references, O(n^2), unneeded re-renders.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging perf anti-patterns with measurement suggestions (Profiler, INP). Out of scope: security, style.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews a diff for WCAG 2.1 AA issues: roles, labels, keyboard nav, contrast.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging a11y gaps with cited WCAG criteria. Out of scope: non-UI code.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews TypeScript types: any leakage, unsound assertions, narrowing gaps.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging type-safety regressions with suggested corrections. Out of scope: runtime behavior.

replace.TODO: Describe in 2-4 sentences.\n (1): Use on PR review requests or when the user asks for a deep multi-axis code audit. Runs security, perf, a11y, and types reviewers in parallel and merges findings. Do NOT trigger for single-line fixes or docs-only diffs.
